poe 一一一一一DEDICATED TO
SHIMA KUNIO

AND TO THE NUMEROUS OTHER SCHOLARS

WHOSE LABORS OVER THE PAST THREE-QUARTERS OF A CENTURY
HAVE ADVANCED THE COURSE OF ORACLE-BONE SCHOLARSHIP
